name: Welcome — The Long Way Around
subject: You're in, {{first_name}} — welcome to The Long Way Around
html_content:
Hey {{first_name}},

Thanks for being here. The Long Way Around is a small newsletter about the scenic route — the detours, the second-guesses, the stories that don't fit anywhere else.

No spam, no schedule I can't keep. Just an essay when I've got one worth your time. Glad you came along.

— Sarah

name: About — What this is
subject: A quick note on what you signed up for
html_content:
So, what is this?

Hi {{first_name}} — figured I'd say it plainly. The Long Way Around is essays. Mostly about the slow way of getting somewhere: friendships, cities, the dumb beautiful things people do.

You'll hear from me maybe once or twice a month. Reply anytime — I read everything.

— Sarah

name: First Essay Is Up
subject: The first one is live: {{essay_title}}
html_content:
{{essay_title}}

It's up. The first real essay of The Long Way Around — {{essay_title}}. I rewrote the opening about nine times, so be gentle.

Read it here and tell me what landed.

— Sarah

name: Founding Reader — Thank You
subject: You were here early, {{first_name}}
html_content:
Hey {{first_name}},

You signed up before I'd even sent a thing, which honestly means a lot. Founding readers get the first look at everything and the occasional behind-the-scenes mess.

Thanks for the early faith. — Sarah

name: Coming Soon (draft)
subject: Almost ready to send the first one
html_content:
Hi {{first_name}} — quick heads up, the first essay is close. Just polishing. Hang tight, it's coming the long way around.

— Sarah
